items.builder_takeaway: Directly changes how a solo dev should scope tokens and permissions for coding agents with GitHub access.
source_facts: Security researchers tricked GitHub's AI agent via prompt injection into leaking private repository contents.
items.title: GitLost: GitHub's AI agent tricked into leaking private repos
items.uncertainty: Unclear whether GitHub has fully remediated the specific exfiltration paths described.

items.builder_takeaway: Dependency-direction news for a very widely used OSS auth library; agent-identity roadmap is decision-relevant for agent builders.
source_facts: Vercel acquired Better Auth and its core team to continue the open-source auth library and build agent identity.
items.title: Vercel acquires Better Auth to accelerate open source auth
items.uncertainty: Long-term licensing/governance of Better Auth under Vercel is not yet demonstrated.

items.builder_takeaway: Widely used SQLite tooling with breaking changes and a genuinely useful new migrations capability.
source_facts: sqlite-utils 4.0 shipped with database schema migrations, nested transactions, and compound foreign keys, plus breaking changes.
items.title: sqlite-utils 4.0: schema migrations, nested transactions, compound foreign keys

items.builder_takeaway: Phone-channel agent building block relevant to voice/calling products like CalenCall.
source_facts: Vercel Chat SDK added a vendor-official Dial adapter enabling bots to use SMS/MMS/iMessage and receive voice-call transcripts on real phone numbers.
items.title: Chat SDK adds Dial support (SMS/MMS/iMessage + voice transcripts)
items.uncertainty: Pricing and per-number provisioning constraints of Dial are not described in the changelog.

items.builder_takeaway: Agent tooling pattern (durable approval gates on write tools) applicable beyond this framework.
source_facts: GitHub Tools released an eve integration that registers the full GitHub toolset with approval-gated write tools in minimal code.
items.title: Give your eve agent GitHub tools
items.uncertainty: Nine-lines claim untested; real-world approval UX unknown.

items.builder_takeaway: Corrects a common false sense of security for anyone publishing packages via OIDC.
source_facts: Trusted Publishing eliminates long-lived credentials but provides no integrity guarantee for what is published, especially under CI compromise.
items.title: You shouldn't trust Trusted Publishing
items.uncertainty: Opinion/analysis piece; no new vulnerability disclosed.

items.builder_takeaway: Root privesc on a production OS; immediate action for affected systems.
source_facts: CVE-2026-57589 is a use-after-free in OpenBSD through 7.9 allowing local privilege escalation to root.
items.title: OpenBSD through 7.9: local privilege escalation to root (CVE-2026-57589)
items.uncertainty: Patch/errata availability at time of triage not confirmed.

items.builder_takeaway: Actionable if any Tenda hardware is on your network; credible CERT sourcing.
source_facts: CERT/CC reports multiple Tenda firmware versions contain a hidden authentication backdoor.
items.title: Tenda firmware ships hidden authentication backdoor
items.uncertainty: Full list of affected models/versions and vendor response not reviewed.

items.builder_takeaway: Early signal on iMessage as an agent channel; not yet decision-grade.
source_facts: Vercel Chat SDK added a vendor-official Photon adapter for native iMessage bot support including group chats and tapbacks.
items.title: Chat SDK adds Photon support (native iMessage bots)
items.uncertainty: Reliability and Apple ToS posture of iMessage automation are unclear.

items.builder_takeaway: Cost-attribution tooling for agent sandboxes; incremental unless on this platform.
source_facts: Vercel Sandbox added detailed per-sandbox resource metrics aligned with billing, at team and project level.
items.title: More granular observability for Vercel Sandbox

items.builder_takeaway: Vercel's Project Settings now includes a project-scoped view of the team Activity Log. Minor console UI convenience with no API or workflow change.
source_facts: Vercel added a project-level view of the Activity Log in Project Settings.
items.title: Vercel Activity Log now viewable at project level

items.builder_takeaway: A 2024 guide to hand-rolling a ZFS NAS resurfaced on HN. Solid hobby-infra content but two years old and not a decision-changer for a solo software business.
source_facts: A 2024 guide describes building a minimal ZFS NAS without commercial NAS distros.
items.title: How to build a minimal ZFS NAS without Synology/QNAP/TrueNAS (2024)

items.builder_takeaway: A Cambridge digital-preservation guide for rescuing data from aging floppy disks. Interesting archival niche with no relevance to solo-builder decisions.
source_facts: A Cambridge guide documents how to preserve data from fragile floppy disks.
items.title: Copy That Floppy — guide for preserving data from fragile floppy disks

items.builder_takeaway: The classic 1986 MIT SICP lecture series resurfaced on HN. Evergreen educational content, not news.
source_facts: MIT's 1986 SICP video lectures are available on OpenCourseWare.
items.title: SICP video lectures (1986)

items.builder_takeaway: A GAO report criticizes DOE's nuclear cleanup option analysis. Government-policy content outside the audience's scope.
source_facts: GAO found DOE is prematurely excluding less expensive options for nuclear waste cleanup.
items.title: GAO: DOE prematurely excluding cheaper nuclear cleanup options

items.builder_takeaway: sqlite-migrate 0.2 retires the standalone library, becoming a compatibility shim over sqlite-utils 4.0's built-in migrations. Covered as part of the main 4.0 story.
source_facts: sqlite-migrate 0.2 retires the library in favor of a compatibility shim over sqlite-utils 4.0.
items.title: sqlite-migrate 0.2 retires into sqlite-utils 4.0

items.builder_takeaway: An experimental Web Component for embedding GitHub code ranges in a page, built with a short GPT-5.5 prompt. A fun demo, but thin — no decision impact.
source_facts: An experimental github-code Web Component embeds line ranges from GitHub files via fetch to raw.githubusercontent.com.
items.title: github-code Web Component

items.builder_takeaway: A short link post pointing to the full sqlite-utils 4.0 write-up. Duplicate of the main story.
items.title: sqlite-utils 4.0 (release link post)

items.builder_takeaway: The final release candidate before sqlite-utils 4.0 stable, mainly incorporating review feedback. Superseded by the stable release the same day.
source_facts: sqlite-utils 4.0rc4 was the last release candidate before the 4.0 stable release.
items.title: sqlite-utils 4.0rc4

summary: Synthesized Nightly Librarian run with 10 promoted item(s), 19 scored item(s), and 9 rejected item(s).
title: Nightly Librarian - 2026-07-09
